pi_items.source: setup_task.ps1 lines 27-29, export_result.ps1 lines 41-43, task.json description

privileged_info_summary: The task uses NCH DreamPlan Home Design Software (https://www.nchsoftware.com/design/), a real commercial software for home and landscape design on Windows 11. The task requires agents to design exterior landscapes for a sample 'Contemporary House' project by adding plantings, circulation paths, outdoor structures, and updating exterior finishes, then exporting overhead site plan and 3D perspective views as JPEG files and saving the project. Three specific output files are required: landscape_site_plan.jpg (minimum 15KB), landscape_3d_view.jpg (minimum 30KB), and landscape_design.dpn project file. The verification system checks file existence, file timestamps (whether created after task start), and file sizes, with a pass threshold of 60+ points and both image files successfully created.
